description_long: This is a green, single-propeller airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a classic WWII-era design. The wings are straight and mid-mounted, each featuring a red circular insignia and decorative graphics near the roots. The nose is painted yellow, matching the tips of the propeller blades and the leading edges of the wings and tail. The cockpit is enclosed with a clear canopy, positioned just behind the propeller and ahead of the wing roots. The tail section includes a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, with a wire bracing extending from the tail to the fuselage. The landing gear is fixed, with two main wheels and a small tail wheel visible.
description: A green, single-propeller airplane with mid-mounted straight wings, red insignia, and yellow accents, featuring an enclosed cockpit and fixed landing gear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the green fuselage, yellow nose, single propeller, mid-mounted wings with red insignia, and the wire bracing from tail to fuselage.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the tail section, horizontal and vertical stabilizers, and the fixed landing gear with two main wheels and a tail wheel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the other side of the fuselage, wing insignia, and propeller details.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the yellow-tipped propeller, cockpit canopy, wing graphics, and the symmetrical wing layout.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with straight wings, no visible winglets, and minimal dihedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and one tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy.
